docTitle: Biibl ne tẽn-gãndg · Biibl wã sẽn pʋgd taab
metaDesc: Pʋg-y Kaool Kʋdrã wakat pʋgd-taabã, a Zezi vɩɩmã, la a Poll so-kẽndã tẽn-gãndg sɩd zugu — Biibl yɛlã zĩnda zĩ-sɩd pʋsẽ.

s.kicker: Biibl wã sẽn pʋgd taab · Tẽn-gãndse
s.title: Biibl ne tẽn-gãndg
s.verse: “Sɩd me, tõnd sẽn wilg yãmb bũmb ninga fãa, Soaal a Zezi Krista sẽn na n wa ne pãng ningã, ad-y ka solem-bãna bɩ yelbũna la d tão-y ye, yaa d sẽn deng n yãend bãmb meng ziirã ne d nifu.” (2Piyɛr 1:16)
s.purpose: Biibl wã ka soalem ye. A yaa neb sẽn kẽn zĩ-sɩdsi, daat la yʋy sẽn yaa sɩd zut gʋlsgo. Pʋg-y sor-kãens tẽn-gãndg zugu, wakat pʋgd-taabã pʋgẽ — pẽ-y zĩig a yembr, wall y pẽ ▶ n pʋg-a bilf-bilfu.
s.ot_kick: ① Kaool Kʋdrã — wakat sẽn pʋgd taaba
s.ot_h: Naanegã tɛk n tãag lebgr Zerizalɛɛm
s.ot_lead: Ka so-kẽng a yembr bal ye, yaa fãagr-kibarã sẽn pʋgd taab naanegã tɛka: naaneg ne lʋɩɩsem → sa-kãseng ne Babɛl → boolgo (a Abrahaam) → kãabg tẽnga → Yiibu → we-raoogo → tõogr → rĩung → welgre → yembdo → lebgre.
s.je_kick: ② Kaool Paalgã — a Zezi vɩɩm
s.je_lead: Pʋg-y a Zezi vɩɩm wa Koe-noog-sɛbã sẽn togsd-a to-to, ne pʋgd-taaba — a rogem Betelɛm tɛka, ne a so-lisg la a Galile tʋʋmdã, n loog Samari, n tãag da-luku, vʋʋgr la dʋʋbo Zerizalɛɛm.
s.pa_kick: ③ Kaool Paalgã — a Poll so-kẽndã
s.pa_h: Ãntios tɛk n tãag dũni wã tɛka — Rom
s.pa_lead: Sɩngr ne Pãntakot Zerizalɛɛm, Koe-noogã sẽn yagse n yɩɩd Zide — n tũ Azi-bila ne Erop n tãag soolmã sũuri. Yãk-y kẽnd a nu wã yembr (pipi·a yiib-n-soaba·a tãab-n-soaba + kẽng Rom + lohorem poore) la y pʋg Tʋʋm-tʋmdba vɩɩm yɛlã ne lɛt-rãmb b sẽn gʋls sorã zug wã.
s.foot: Sẽn-yit-zĩisi · Zĩisã pʋgda Biibl gomdã ne Biibl tẽn-bãngr sẽn zãad (ne rũndã-rũndã yʋy sã n sõngdẽ). Ko-noya, kʋɩls la mogd yita tẽn-bãngr data sẽn yaa pakr (Natural Earth), sẽn booge.

eden.name: Edɛn (Naaneg · Lʋɩɩsem)
eden.today: Rũnna, Tɩgr ne Efrat kʋɩls sʋk tẽnga
eden.note: Dũni sẽn naan n yaa sõma wʋsgo pʋgẽ, yel-wẽn kẽeme n kao loees ning sẽn da be Wẽnd ne ninsaal sʋkã.
events: Naaneg raar a yoobe — «a yaa sõma wʋsgo»
Ninsaal sẽn naan wa Wẽnd wõnde
Lʋɩɩsmã, la b yiisg Edɛn
Pipi Koe-noog kãabga — «paga kamba na n bedsa waafã zugu»

noah.name: Ararat (Sa-kãsengã)
noah.today: Rũnna, Ararat tãnga, Tʋrki wĩntoog-pukr babgẽ
noah.note: Wẽnd kaoo dũni sẽn pid ne yel-wẽnd bʋʋdo, la baasgo a kogla vɩɩm ne zak a yembr maasem.
events: Dũni sẽn pid ne wẽnem
Sa-kãsengã, la a Noe koglgã
Saag-gãong kaoolã — «sa-kãseng kõn le sãam dũni ye»

babel.name: Babɛl gasgã
babel.note: Wilg-m-menga sẽn dat n ta saasẽ taoore, Wẽnd sãeega b goamã la a sãeeg nebã dũni wã gill zugu.
events: «Bɩ d me galʋ-tẽng la gasg… n paam yʋʋr d mensẽ»
Wẽnd sãeega b goamã
Nebã sãeega dũni wã zugu (Sinaar — sẽn wa n lebg Babilon)

ur.name: Ur
ur.note: Biibl wã fãagr kibarã sɩngda ne rao a yembr boolgo.
events: Wẽnd boola a Abram t'a yi Kalde nebã Ur tẽngẽ
«M na n kɩtame tɩ f lebg buud kãsenga… dũni buud fãa na n paam barka fo maasem»
Ne tẽebo, a basa a tẽnga

haran.name: Haran
haran.note: Sorã zugu, a leokda boolgã n tʋgd kãabg tẽngã.
events: A Tera zakã sigla Haran
A Tera kiime
A Abram yikame n kẽng Kanaã a yʋʋm 75 wã

shechem.name: Sikɛm · Kanaã
shechem.note: Kãabg tẽngã pʋgẽ, zak a yembr n luge la kaoolã loogda yaool-rãmbã.
events: Kẽeg Kanaã, pipi tẽn-kugri — «m na n kõo fo yagengã tẽn-kãnga»
Kaoolã (Sɩngrẽ 15) · a Izaak · a Zakoob
A Zakoob kamb piig la a yiibu — buud piig la a yiibã yẽgre

egypt.name: Ezipt (Gosɛn)
egypt.note: Zak a yembr n lebg buud kãsenga — la rẽ poore, yembs buudu.
events: A Zozɛf b sẽn koose, n zẽk n lebg naab Ezipt
A Zakoob zakã fãa sig n na n põs komã
Israyɛl buudã sẽn da paamd pãngã lebg yembse

sinai.name: Sinayi tãnga
sinai.note: Kaool Kʋdrã fãagr sẽn yɩɩd fãa — yembs n lebg Wẽnd meng nebã.
events: Toad piigã la Pak pe-bila
Mog-miuugã welgame la b pɩʋʋge
Tõog Goam piigã, Tõogã, fu-roogã la maoongã

kadesh.name: Kadɛs (we-raoogo)
kadesh.note: Tẽeb kaalem kɩtame tɩ yaool a yembr kong tẽngã — la baasgo Wẽnd kell n zĩnda ne-ba.
events: Tẽn-gũusdb piig la a yiibu — la nebã zãgs n ka tẽ ye
Yʋʋm 38 we-raoogẽ — manã, sa-wilg-luglg la bugum
Moaab pʋʋgẽ, a Moyiiz sõsg-yaoolgã (Tõog Kʋdr)

jericho.name: Zeriko
jericho.note: Baasgo, b kẽe n dɩ kãabg tẽngã.
events: Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã welgame la nebã pɩʋʋge
Zeriko lalsã lʋɩɩme
Kanaã zĩndg la tẽngã pʋɩɩbo

shiloh.name: Silo (Bʋ-kaoodba)
shiloh.note: Naab sẽn ka be, ned kam fãa maanda a sẽn date — b baooda naab sɩda.
events: Fu-roogã lugra Silo
Yel-wẽn–nams–fãagr ylemdã (a Debora, a Zedeõ, a Sãmsõ)
A Rut — sɩd-pʋʋsem lik wakate, a Davɩɩd buudẽ

jerusalem.name: Zerizalɛɛm · Rĩung a yembrã
jerusalem.note: Israyɛl ziirã wakate — la naab sẽn na n dɩ naam wakat fãa kãabga.
events: A Sayɩll pipi naaba, rẽ poore a Davɩɩd ne a Goliat
Kaoolã ne a Davɩɩd — «fo zaoorã na n viglame wakat fãa» (2Samwɛl 7)
A Salomõ meega wẽn-doogã Zerizalɛɛm

samaria.name: Samari · Rĩung sẽn welg taabã
samaria.note: Rĩungã welga taab n sãamd bilf-bilf tɩ bãngdbã kelemde.
events: A Salomõ poore, welgr Zida ne Israyɛl sʋka
Bõn-naands pʋʋsg sẽn pʋgd taaba
A Eli, a Ezayi, a Zeremi kelmda «lebg-y n wa» — la b togs Mesi wã yelle

nineveh.name: Niniv (Asiri)
nineveh.note: B sẽn kong keoogr fãa, goabg babgã n deng n lʋɩ.
events: Niniv sẽn yaa Asiri tẽng-kãsenga
Goabg rĩungã lʋɩɩ Asiri nengẽ (yʋʋm 722 sẽn deng a Zezi rogem)
B tʋma a Zonas Niniv

babylon.name: Babilon
babylon.note: Yʋng sẽn yaa lik n yɩɩda — la baasgo lebgr kãabgã ket n bee.
events: Zerizalɛɛm lʋɩɩme, la b yõog wẽn-doogã (yʋʋm 586 sẽn deng a Zezi rogem)
B talla Zida Babilon
A Daniɛl ne a Ezekiyɛl — tẽeb la bãngr-yũ-yãad yembd tẽngẽ

susa.name: Suz (Pɛrs)
susa.note: Baa bõn-naands pʋʋsdb soolem sũ-biisẽ, Wẽnd geta a nebã yell.
events: Pɛrs tõoga Babilon
A Ɛstɛɛr fãaga Zʋɩf rãmbã ne sãoongo
A Nehemi pʋʋsa naabã taoore la b tʋm-a

return.name: Lebgr Zerizalɛɛm
return.note: B lebgame n le me — la naab nan ka wa ye. B gũuda Mesi wã.
events: Lebgr soog a tãab ne a Sirus noorã (a Zorobabɛl 538 · Esdras 458 · Nehemi 444)
Wẽn-doogã megr a paalg la Zerizalɛɛm lalsã manegre
A Malaki — Kaool Kʋdrã baasda: «M na n tʋma m koe-taasda»

bethlehem.name: Betelɛm
bethlehem.note: Mesi ning b sẽn kãabã wata a Davɩɩd tẽngẽ — Gomdã sẽn lebg neda.
events: B roga-a Betelɛm, a Davɩɩd tẽngã
Malɛgsã moona koɛɛgã pe-kɩɩmbã
Bãng-dãmbã waame n waoog-a

nazareth.name: Nazarɛt
nazareth.note: Wẽnd bɩta wa ninsaal tẽn-bilf pʋgẽ.
events: B wuba-a ra-wãada zakẽ
A sẽn tar yʋʋm piig la a yiibu, a sokda la a leokd wẽn-doogẽ
Rẽ poore, b zãgs-a-la a ba-yir karen-doogẽ

jordan.name: Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlga
jordan.note: A tʋʋmdã zãma taoor sɩngdame — saasẽ wilgda t'a yaa Biiga.
events: A Zã lisa-a koom
Sɩɩg Sõngã sig wa wʋʋbo — «Ada yaa mam Bi-nongra»
A tõoga Sʋtãan makr a tãabã we-raoogẽ

cana.name: Kana
cana.note: A yel-soalg a pipi soab pʋgẽ, a puka a ziirã.
events: A yɩɩ sãan kãadem pʋgẽ
Koom sẽn lebg divẽ — a pipi yel-soalgã
A karen-biisã tẽ-a-la

sychar.name: Sikaar (Samari)
sychar.note: Tʋʋm-sɩngrã sore — a looga Zerizalɛɛm n kẽng Samari sẽn paoogdã.
events: A yɩlga wẽn-doogã Zerizalɛɛm
Yʋngo, a Nikodɛm — «Tɩlae tɩ b le rog foo»
Vɩɩm koom Samari pag yĩnga

capernaum.name: Kapɛrnaum
capernaum.note: Galile tʋʋmdã sɩ-zĩiga — boolgo, zãmsg la kɩɩsg fãa seg ka.
events: A boola zĩm-yõkdbã la a maan ka a zĩ-sɩda
Tãngã zug sõsgã — «Bark bee ne sẽn yaa naong-rãmb b sɩɩgẽ wã»
Rĩungã yel-soalsã — la kɩɩsg sẽn dɩkd pãnga

galilee.name: Galile ko-kãsenga
galilee.note: Ne pãng bõn-naands zutu, a wilgda a sẽn yaa a soaba.
events: «Sĩ-y bala» — a sĩnsa sob-kãsengã
A rɩlga neb tus a nu ne bur a nu la zĩm a yiibu
A kẽnda koomã zug

caesarea_p.name: Sezare-Filip
caesarea_p.note: Karen-biisã bãnga t'a yaa Krista, la da-lukã sor pakdame.
events: A Pɩyɛɛr kaset-kãsengã — «Yãmb yaa Krista, Wẽnd sẽn vɩ wã Biiga»
A deng n togsa a kũum la a vʋʋgrã
A yĩngã tekame ne ziir tãngã zugu

jericho.name: Zeriko
jericho.note: Sor sẽn dʋʋd Zerizalɛɛm zugu, a baooda sẽn menemã.
events: A maaga zoang a Bartime tɩ b nifã puki
A boola yaood-deegd a Zase
«Ninsaal Biiga waame n na n bao la a fãag sẽn menemã»

bethany.name: Betani
bethany.note: A semen yaoolgã sɩngr sẽnese, a wilga a sẽn tõe kũumã.
events: A vʋʋga a Lazaar yaoogẽ — «Mam yaa vʋʋgr la vɩɩm»
A Maari zaaga-a kaam a mumbu yĩnga
Yel-soalg kãng kɩtame tɩ b sɩ-yõk n na n kʋ-a

jerusalem.name: Zerizalɛɛm
jerusalem.note: Zĩig ning Biibl wã fãa sẽn debdẽ — da-luku, vʋʋgr la dʋʋbo.
events: Kẽeg ne ziiri; a le lebga wẽn-doogã taabl-dãmbã
Zaab yaoolg rɩɩbẽ, a peega karen-biisã naowã
A kiime da-luk zugu
A vʋʋgame raar a tãab daare, rẽ poor a dʋ saasẽ

antioch.name: Ãntios
antioch.note: Wẽn-doog ning sẽn tʋmd tɩ bʋ-zẽms nebã tʋʋmdã sɩngd la a lebgdẽ wã.
events: Pʋʋsg sasa, Sɩɩg Sõngã welga a Barnabas ne a Sool
Wẽn-doog ning pʋgẽ b sẽn deng n boond tẽedbã tɩ «kiris-neba»
Pipi, a yiib-n-soab la a tãab-n-soab kẽnda sɩngr zĩiga

seleucia.name: Selesi
seleucia.note: Ãntios koglg-zĩiga — b kẽe koom-koglg n kẽng Sɩpr.

paphos.name: Pafos
paphos.note: B wilga pãng sẽn kɩɩsd Koe-noogã taoore.
events: A Elimas so-tʋʋsdã lebga zoanga
Goosneer a Sɛrzius Poll tẽeme
Ka tɛka, «a Poll» n lʋɩ taoore

perga.name: Pɛrze
perga.note: Ko-yõbg Pãmfili — ka la a Zã Mark lebg poore.

pantioch.name: Pizidi Ãntios
pantioch.note: Koe-noogã pakda sor n tʋg bʋ-zẽms rãmbã.
events: Fãagr-kibar sõs-woko karen-doogẽ
Bʋ-zẽms rãmb wʋsg maana sũ-noog n deeg gomdã
Kɩɩsg kɩtame tɩ b digd-ba

iconium.name: Ikoniom
iconium.note: Neb wʋsg tẽeme, la namsg kɩtame tɩ b kẽnge.

lystra.name: Listr
lystra.note: B reng n geel-b-la wa wẽnnaam, rẽ poore b loba-b ne kugã.
events: A maaga rao sẽn dog n yaa wobre
Zãma wã ratame n maan-b maoong wa wẽnnaam dãmba
B loba-a ne kug n bas-a wa a kiime, la a yikame

derbe.name: Dɛrb
derbe.note: B maana karen-biis wʋsgo; b lebga b poor n keng wẽn-doto pãnga.

troas.name: Troas
troas.note: Zĩig ning Koe-noogã sẽn deng n tʋgd Erop wã.
events: Bãngr-yũud Masedoan rao yelle
«Pɩʋʋg-y n wa sõng-y tõndo»
B pɩʋʋg tao-tao n kẽng Erop

philippi.name: Filip
philippi.note: Erop pipi wẽn-doogã — Koe-noogã tõoge baa bãens roogẽ.
events: A Lidi, sẽn koosd pɛɛl-fut sẽn yaa miuungo, tẽeme
Yamb-pʋg-poak sẽn da togsd bagr paama lohorem
Yʋn-sʋk yɩɩla, tẽng-digimdgu, bãens-gũud zakã fãa fãagre

thess.name: Tesalonik
thess.note: Gomdã digimda tẽngã la kɩɩsg puuge.
events: A sõsa karen-doogẽ sabat raad a tãabo
«Neb niyns sẽn lubg dũni wã»
B yi-b-la yʋngo

berea.name: Bere
berea.note: «Neb sõma» nins sẽn vaees gomdã b mensã.
events: B deega gomdã ne yamleoog wʋsgo
Daar fãa b vaeesda Gʋlsg Sõamyã n ges a sã n yaa sɩda
Neb wʋsg wa tẽeme

athens.name: Atɛn
athens.note: Yam-dãmb tẽngẽ, a moonda «wẽnnaam ning b sẽn ka mi wã».
events: Tẽng sẽn pid ne bõn-naands sãeega a sũuri
Areopaz zug a moona Naanda ne vʋʋgrã
B laa a yĩnga, la kẽer tẽeme

corinth.name: Korẽnt
corinth.note: A zĩnda yʋʋm la pʋ-sʋk n lug wẽn-doog tʋʋm-wẽns tẽngẽ.
events: A maana fu-roto ne a Akilas ne a Prisil
«Da zoe rabeem ye… bala mam bee ne foo»
Korẽnt neb wʋsg tẽeme la b lis-b koom

ephesus.name: Efɛɛz
ephesus.note: Kẽnd a tãab-n-soabã sũuri — gomdã yagsda Azi tẽngã fãa.
events: Zãmsg daar fãa yʋʋm a yiib a Tiranus roogẽ
So-tʋʋsg sɛb yõogre; tʋʋm-kãsemse
Wɛg-tʋmd a Demetrius yika zãma zabre

miletus.name: Mile
miletus.note: Nintãm ne Efɛɛz kãsem-dãmbã kaoosg goama.
events: «Ges-y wẽn-doog ning a sẽn da ne a meng zɩɩm yellã»
Kãsem-dãmbã yãbdame, b sẽn mi tɩ b ka na le yã-a wã

caesarea.name: Sezare
caesarea.note: Yʋʋm a yiib a kogenda Koe-noogã goosneer-dãmb ne naab a yembr taoore.
events: Bʋʋd goosneer a Feliks ne a Fɛstus taoore
A kogr-goam naab a Agripa taoore
«M kota Sezaar bʋʋdo» — n kẽng Rom

jerusalem.name: Zerizalɛɛm
jerusalem.note: B yõk-a-la wẽn-doogẽ, la a bãens-neda sorã sɩngdame.
events: Zãma wã yõk-a-la wẽn-doogẽ
A kogenda a meng sull-kãsengã taoore
A sẽn yaa Rom tẽng-biigã, b tʋm-a ne gũudb n kẽng Sezare

myra.name: Mira
myra.note: B tekame n kẽ Aleksãndri koom-koglg sẽn debd Rom.

fairhaven.name: Ko-yõb-sõama (Krɛt)
fairhaven.note: B ka kelg a Poll keoogr t'a bas koglgã kẽnd ye.

crete.name: Krɛt
crete.note: A lohorem poore, tẽng-kʋɩlg ning a sẽn bas a Tit t'a segl wẽn-doto wã.
events: A basa a Tit t'a yãk kãsem-dãmb tẽng fãa pʋgẽ
A kota taoor-dãmb sẽn ka tar taal la sẽn yaa sɩd-dãmba
A gʋlsa lɛtr a Tit

malta.name: Malt
malta.note: Ne sob-kãseng la koglg-sãoongo, Wẽnd kãabgã kell n yɩɩ sɩda.
events: «Sob-kãsengã» sãama koglgã, la neb 276 wã fãa põsa kũum
Waaf dõm-a-la la a ka paam wẽng ye
A maaga tẽng-kʋɩlgã bãad-dãmba

syracuse.name: Sirakuz
syracuse.note: B zĩnda rasem a tãab Sisil.

puteoli.name: Pizol
puteoli.note: B sig Itali la tẽed-n-taas seg-b-la.

rome.name: Rom
rome.note: Koe-noogã tãaga soolmã sũur baasgo — ka sɛɛb ye, yaa sɩngre.
events: Yʋʋm a yiib a zakẽ bãens pʋgẽ, a moonda Rĩungã ne raoodo
Ka tɛka, a gʋlsa Bãens roog lɛtrã (Efɛɛz·Filip·Kolos·Filemõ)
Rẽ poore b le pʋg-a bãense, a gʋlsa 2Timote la b kʋ-a a tẽeb yĩnga — «Mam zaba zab-sõngo, m baasa m no-loeese»

journeys.rome: Kẽnd a naas-n-soabã · sẽn tʋg Rom
